definition: An agreement between two or more parties, to perform a specific job or work order, often temporary or of fixed duration and usually governed by a written agreement.
example: Marriage is a contract.
exampleVi: Hôn nhân là một hợp đồng.

definition: An understanding between entities to follow a specific course of conduct.
example: to enter an agreement;  the UK and US negotiators nearing agreement;  he nodded his agreement.
exampleVi: để tham gia một thỏa thuận;  các nhà đàm phán Anh và Mỹ sắp đạt được thỏa thuận;  anh gật đầu đồng ý.

definition: A division, a portion, a share.
example: We gave three deals of grain in tribute to the king.
exampleVi: Chúng tôi đã dâng ba lạng thóc để cống nạp cho nhà vua.

definition: A binding agreement concluded by subjects of international law, namely states and international organizations.
example: We need to understand the concept of treaty.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm hiệp ước.

definition: (sometimes also used uncountably) A visible indication.
example: I gave them a thumbs-up sign.
exampleVi: Tôi đưa ngón tay cái lên cho họ.

definition: A person's name, written by that person, used as identification or to signify approval of accompanying material, such as a legal contract.
example: We need to understand the concept of signature.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm chữ ký.

definition: (grammar) A verb, its necessary grammatical arguments, and any adjuncts affecting them.
example: We need to understand the concept of clause.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm mệnh đề.

definition: That which limits the extent of anything; limit, extremity, bound, boundary.
example: "Alright, look...we can spend the holidays with your parents, but this time it will be on my terms."
exampleVi: "Được rồi, nghe này...chúng ta có thể dành kỳ nghỉ với bố mẹ cậu, nhưng lần này sẽ theo điều kiện của tôi."

definition: A logical clause or phrase that a conditional statement uses. The phrase can either be true or false.
example: We need to understand the concept of condition.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm điều kiện.

definition: A person or group of people constituting a particular side in a contract or legal action.
example: The contract requires that the party of the first part pay the fee.
exampleVi: Hợp đồng yêu cầu bên thứ nhất phải trả phí.

definition: Someone who is associated with another in a common activity or interest.
example: We need to understand the concept of partner.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đối tác.

definition: The legal department of a company.
example: Legal wants this in writing.
exampleVi: Pháp lý muốn điều này bằng văn bản.

definition: To tie; to confine by any ligature.
example: We need to understand the concept of binding.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm ràng buộc.

definition: A gap or opening made by breaking or battering, as in a wall, fortification or levee / embankment; the space between the parts of a solid body rent by violence
example: We need to understand the concept of breach.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm vi phạm.

definition: To end, especially in an incomplete state.
example: to terminate a surface by a line
exampleVi: để kết thúc một bề mặt bằng một đường

definition: To make (something) new again; to restore to freshness or original condition.
example: We need to understand the concept of renew.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đổi mới.

definition: To increase in extent.
example: We need to understand the concept of extend.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm mở rộng.

definition: A current of air, usually coming into a room or vehicle.
example: We need to understand the concept of draft.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm dự thảo.

definition: To confer with others in order to come to terms or reach an agreement.
example: We need to understand the concept of negotiate.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm đàm phán.

definition: To sanction officially; to ratify; to confirm; to set as satisfactory.
example: Although we may disagree with it, we must nevertheless approve the sentence handed down by the court-martial.
exampleVi: Mặc dù chúng tôi có thể không đồng ý với điều đó, nhưng chúng tôi vẫn phải chấp nhận bản án mà tòa án quân sự đưa ra.

definition: That which complies with justice, law or reason.

definition: An obligation, debt or responsibility owed to someone.

definition: A legal sentence.

definition: The settlement of differences by arbitration or by consent reached by mutual concessions.
example: We need to understand the concept of compromise.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm thỏa hiệp.

definition: The state of being allied.
example: matrimonial alliances; an alliance between church and state, or between two countries
exampleVi: liên minh hôn nhân; một liên minh giữa nhà thờ và nhà nước, hoặc giữa hai quốc gia

definition: The act of conducting or carrying out (business, negotiations, plans).
example: The transaction was made on Friday with the supplier.
exampleVi: Giao dịch được thực hiện vào thứ Sáu với nhà cung cấp.

definition: A piece of nonfictional writing such as a story, report, opinion piece, or entry in a newspaper, magazine, journal, dictionary, encyclopedia, etc.
example: We need to understand the concept of article.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bài viết.

definition: An agreement between parties concerning the sale of property; or a contract by which one party binds himself to transfer the right to some property for a consideration, and the other party binds himself to receive the property and pay the consideration.
example: We need to understand the concept of bargain.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm mặc cả.

definition: An agreement to do or not do a particular thing.
example: We need to understand the concept of covenant.

definition: An agreement or contract.
example: We need to understand the concept of compact.

definition: A cutting; a part cut out from the rest of something.
example: We need to understand the concept of section.
